_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Bua motsoalle, ebe o kene.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan e hahilwe ho bula dipuo tsohle. Puo e ngoe le e ngoe e na le moputso o mong wa phetolelo.
speakFriend.marksAwarded: Marks e fuwe (litokene tsa ho nka karolo)
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Lethathamo la dipuo le litheko tsa Marks ke tsa nakoana. Marks ke litokene tsa ho nka karolo, esio seabo.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Fetola Liana Banyan ho {{language}}. Fumana {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeWelcome: Karete tsa Amohetsoa / Lefatshe la Meea
speakFriend.scopeCueCards: Sete e kaholimo ya Karete tsa Maikutlo
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Dihlahlobo tsa tsela le melaetsa ya mathata
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Puo ya motheo -- ha ho moputso o hlokahileng.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Lentsoe la Mosehli: Ke Hobaneng le Mantsoe Ana
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Lentsoe lohle mona le bitswa ka lebaka. Motheo wa mabitso a 26 a bohlokwa.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Meputso ya Phetolelo e Sebetsa Jwang
speakFriend.step1Body: Bula Moputso wa Phetolelo ho tswa Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Fetola listring tsohle tse hlokahileng. Romela ka Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Ka mora ho amohelwa, o fumana Marks le ho kwadiswa ho IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Re moratwi, o kene."

languageSwitcher.tip: Sebedisa diphasewete tsa dipuo tse fapaneng ho Lefako la Durin ho bula maitemogelo a ikhethang!
